textByHashes.c6eb5ccc0ab7e12b1025ce3e8809652e69f96c80: That evil witch put me in here! She kidnapped me!
textByHashes.f00b92f21896ea9bc33b7b92f91391706a053864: She wanted the secret of my ogleroots, so she did!
textByHashes.b47960a04f3040cf935cbd1c1c91679739d8f4ee: Well now, I have perfected a spell that would grow an ogleroot to an enormous size.
textByHashes.c0ecc40893825db25c932d1eccf8d21059867ea2: You know, I had the very same problem so I came up with a simple solution. I used a spell I learned from a chap called Larry to shrink 'em down really small so that I could carry whole bags filled with 'em to the
textByHashes.06f29ffacfa306de6525aeaa1948d28bab2dd51b: Then when I got there, I would use the growing spell once more to make 'em huge and sell 'em for a tidy sum.
textByHashes.bd6438b0e94e1e18284a680951a6abc15ef2027a: Well that old witch - she's a sly one, I tell you. She found out about my spell and kidnapped me along with my bag of ogleroots.
textByHashes.a5694b2f628b1f7e2ac8bbc6a697cbc1ce47f847: She wants the secret of the spell but I ain't talking! No sir! So she's been feeding my mini-ogleroots to those ugly...things over there.
textByHashes.a956e614a35f9f0f3a28d7a5ef778b36c3db30ed: Not yet, no. And I still ain't telling her. But from what I gather, she's started to use them ogleroots in some of her potions for something. I don't know what, though.
textByHashes.740434729ce7f735b010246020983f41c1717114: No, it's ok. I want to keep an eye on what the witch is up to down here with these odd creatures.
textByHashes.4567e1c9bf88f55166e5da5cc7cc3a72604ef760: Yes, I'll be fine for now. Good luck with your tasks!
